description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a prominent carry handle integrated with iron sights on top of the receiver. The rifle has a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The handguard is ribbed for grip and extends forward to a standard-length barrel, which is capped with a flash hider. The overall design is angular and utilitarian, with visible seams and mechanical details such as the magazine release and charging handle. The rifle's construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement firearms.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and flash hider. Features include a detachable box magazine and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, detachable magazine, and flash hider.
description_view_2: Viewed from the stock end, the rifle's buttstock and pistol grip are prominent, with the barrel and handguard receding into the distance.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile displays the same features as the left, with the ejection port and magazine release more visible.
